info.description: This is the API documentation for the lead bidding service, which allows partners of AccuQuote to send information called leads to be bid on and accepted into AccuQuote's system.
info.title: Bidding Service API

servers.description: The QA environment used to test the integrated application
The UAT environment used by AccuQuote to test the application

tags.name: lead
tags.description: Any function of the API related to working with leads.

post.summary: Audits and makes a bid for a lead.

200.description: If the lead has been bid on, then send the lead and the bid back to the affiliate. If the lead was rejected for non-validation reasons, such as a lack of bidding budget, then return the rejection and reason.

400.description: If the lead is rejected by data validation, then return a Bad Request.

500.description: If there is a problem with the Bidding Service itself unrelated to the request, then return an Internal Service Error.

post.description: Audits and makes a bid for a lead.

post.summary: Attempts to accept a lead that was won.

200.description: If the won lead is accepted by AccuQuote, return the lead id with an accepted tag. If the lead was rejected for non-validation reasons, such as a lack of bidding budget, then return the rejection and reason.

400.description: If the won lead is rejected by data validation, then return a Bad Request.

500.description: If there is a problem with the Bidding Service itself unrelated to the request, then return an Internal Service Error.

post.description: Attempts to accept a lead that was won.

PingLead.description: The lead information that is needed for the system to bid.

WonLead.description: The lead information that was won and is to be checked for acceptance.

leadiDId.description: The leadiD token associated with this lead.

leadiDEntity.description: The leadiD entity label associated with the lead to distinguish between sub-partners.

firstName.description: The first name of the lead.

lastName.description: The last name of the lead.

address.description: The street address line of where the lead lives.

address2.description: The street address line 2 of where the lead lives.

city.description: The city of residence for the lead.

zip.description: The zip code of where the lead resides.

usCitizen.description: If the lead is a US Citizen, true or false.

birthDate.description: The lead's birth date in format 'yyyy-mm-dd.

usesTobacco.description: Whether or not lead uses tobacco currently.

requestedCoverageAmount.description: The amount of coverage requested for a policy.

ipAddress.description: The ip address of the lead as a string.

landingUrl.description: The landing page url sent from a lead as a string.

optInDate.description: The opt-in date for the lead in format 'yyyy-mm-dd.

optInTime.description: The opt-in time for the lead in format 'HH:MM'.

test.description: Indicates whether this lead is a test.

leadId.description: The id of the PingLead that was won.

firstName.description: The first name of the lead.

lastName.description: The last name of the lead.

address.description: The street address line of where the lead lives.

address2.description: The street address line 2 of where the lead lives.

city.description: The city of residence for the lead.

zip.description: The zip code of where the lead resides.

Gender.description:
Represents the gender as an id.
* `1` Male
* `2` Female

TobaccoUseType.description:
Represents the tobacco use type category as an id.
* `2` never smoked
* `3` Smokes Cigars - Maximum 1 per Month
* `4` on the patch
* `5` chews nicotine gum
* `6` smokes more than one pack of cigarettes a day
* `7` smokes no more than one pack of cigarettes a day
* `8` quit less than one year ago
* `9` quit 1-2 years ago
* `10` quit 2-3 years ago
* `11` quit 3-5 years ago
* `12` quit over 5 years ago
* `13` smokes a pipe
* `14` chews tobacco
* `15` E-Cigarettes
* `16` Marijuana User - Recreational
* `17` Smokes Cigars - Maximum 1 per Week
* `18` Smokes Cigars - More than 1 per Week
* `19` No
* `20` Yes
* `21` smokes cigars
* `22` quit over 10 years ago
* `23` unknown

ProductType.description: Indicates the type of insurance the lead seeks.

Consumer's tobacco use type category as an id.
* `1` AIDS / HIV
* `2` Alcohol / Drug Abuse
* `3` Alzheimer's Dementia
* `4` Asthma
* `5` Cancer
* `6` Clinical Depression
* `7` Diabetes
* `8` Emphysema

* `19` Stroke
* `20` Ulcers
* `21` Vascular Disease

TermLength.description:
The requested term length as an id.
* `2` 5-Year Guaranteed Level Premium Term
* `3` 10-Year Guaranteed Level Premium Term
* `4` 15-Year Guaranteed Level Premium Term
* `5` 20-Year Guaranteed Level Premium Term
* `6` 25-Year Guaranteed Level Premium Term
* `7` 30-Year Guaranteed Level Premium Term
* `8` Universal Life
* `9` Second-to-Die (survivorship Insurance)
* `17` Whole Life
* `20` To Age 100 Guaranteed
* `21` 30 Year Return of Premium
* `22` 20 Year Return of Premium
* `23` 15 Year Return of Premium
* `100` Unsure
* `101` Unknown
* `102` Other
* `103` Long Term Care
* `104` 25 Year Return of Premium
* `105` Annually Renewable Term (ART)
* `106` Health - Under 65
* `107` Health - Med Sup
* `108` Final Expense
* `109` Disability
* `110` Property and Casualty
* `111` 35-Year Guaranteed Level Term

leadId.description: If `responseType` is 'bid', the id of the lead in the Bidding Service.

responseType.description: The type of response to a lead ping, either 'bid' or 'reject'.

reason.description: If `responseType` is 'reject', the reason why the lead was rejected.

id.description:
The id of the rejection reason
* `1`  Unauthorized
* `2` Validation Error
* `3`  Runtime Exception
* `4`  LeadiD Audit Failure
* `5`  Client error
* `6`  Lead declined
* `7`  Unknown
* `8`  Schedule Check Error
* `9`  Bid Error

message.description: The description of what went wrong when validating the lead.

amount.description: If `responseType` is 'bid', the amount that was bid on the lead.

currency.description: If `responseType` is 'bid', the bid's currency as string. 'USD' is only option for now.

responseType.description: The type of response to a lead ping, either 'bid' or 'reject'.

reason.description: If `responseType` is 'reject', the reason why the lead was rejected.

* `4`  LeadiD Audit Failure
* `5`  Client error
* `6`  Lead declined
* `7`  Unknown
* `8`  Schedule Check Error
* `9`  Bid Error
